name: Strawberry Meringue Pudding
recipeIngredient: 1 cup cake or sweet biscuit crumbs
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 190°C.
2. Place strawberries in an oven dish and sprinkle with half a cup of icing sugar.
3. Heat milk in a saucepan.
4. In a separate bowl, beat egg yolks and stir into the hot milk.
5. Add cake or biscuit crumbs to the milk mixture and spread over the strawberries.
6. Bake for 20-25 minutes until set.
7. Beat the egg whites until stiff peaks form.
8. Fold in the castor sugar.
9. Remove pudding from oven and place meringue on top in peaks or swirls.
10. Return to oven and bake at a lower temperature (130°C) for an additional 15-20 minutes.
11. Makes 6 servings.
Posted by Stephen Ceideberg; November 17, 1992.
